MetalHull.title: Ship structure
MetalHull.description: A basic structural hull that is required to enable the placement of interior decking. Place this first, then add deck plating on top to create rooms.

MetalFloor.title: Deck plating
MetalFloor.description: Interior deck plating used to create rooms inside your ship. Must be placed on top of a ships structure.

BlastDoor.title: Airlock door
BlastDoor.description: A powered automatic and air tight door that can be used unpowered, but will be slower to operate. It will not leak atmosphere to external space.

ArmouredBlastDoor.title: Armoured airlock door
ArmouredBlastDoor.description: A powered automatic and reinforced air tight door that can be used unpowered, but will be slower to operate. It will not leak atmosphere to external space.

MetalHullCorner.title: Armoured hull wall
MetalHullCorner.description: Armoured hull used on ship exteriors. Utilises a porous construction to save weight, therefore it does not hold atmosphere.

MetalHullAngle.title: Armoured hull wall
MetalHullAngle.description: Armoured hull used on ship exteriors. Utilises a porous construction to save weight, therefore it does not hold atmosphere.
